heroHeadline: ICE Reissues $10M Reward for Iván Archivaldo — El Mayo Sentencing Now May 18
heroSubtitle: 632 days since Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada's capture — EDNY sentencing postponed a second time (to May 18, 2026); defense cites ongoing Sinaloa violence blocking safe witness access. April 14: ICE reiterates $10 million reward for Chapitos co-leader Iván Archivaldo Guzmán Salazar (last known location: Culiacán); four Sinaloa-linked Salazar family members arrested in Lancaster, CA for cartel drug and ghost gun trafficking. Civil war at 586 days: La Mayiza controls ~90% of former Chapitos territory; 2,415+ conflict homicides, 9,000+ families displaced. Sinaloa Cartel attributed ~195 attacks in April 2026 alone.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, La Jornada, CBC News, Excelsior, El Diario del Noroeste, White House ONDCP, DOJ, El Informador, El Imparcial, Latin Times, Zeta Tijuana, NBC Los Angeles, KTLA, Washington Times
